'''Tentator''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Tentator system/Legends|Tentator system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]], used as a [[Prison/Legends|prison]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The [[Slams|Slam gang]] escaped from the [[Greylands Security Complex]] on-[[Planet/Legends|planet]], but were recaptured and returned to the poorly-maintained high-security prison, along with their ship, an [[Ubrikkian star yacht]].

[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]], along with their respective apprentices, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Ferus Olin]], visited Tentator to pick up the Slams' yacht after its recapture.

{{Planet-stub}}
